title: Looking for Teacher at VIT University South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at VIT University South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
VIT University South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VIT University South Asia Partners:
VIT University South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VIT University South Asia Partners!

address.streetAddress: VIT University South Asia Partners Office
